Tgl-Hcit, GORRIGITNDLM 'New Delhi, the 22nd March, 2007 ■ G.S.R. 227(E) *—In the Notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Company Affairs published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 17th November, 2006, vide G.S.R. 709(E) dated the 17thNovember, 2006, at pages 4 to 8, in respect of the Company Secretaries (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006,— (1) at page 4,— ; ‘ € >' (a) in Rule 2, in the Definitions,— ft) for serial numbers “(mJ, (n), (o), (p), (q) and (r)” read “(a), (b), (c), (d), (c) and .(f)”; (ii) hi clause (fffor “Tribunal” means the Tribunal formed under sub-section (1) of Section 1 of the Act’, read ' ‘‘Tribunal” means the Tribunal formed under sub-section (1) of Section 10B of the Act*. (2) atpagc5,insub-rule(3),ofrule3,/orserialnumbers“(k),(l),(ni),(n)and(o)”, read “(a),(b),(c),(d)and(e)”. . ’ . . - [F.No. 5/2/2007 CE-V.I ■ JITESH KHOSLA, Jt.
